notes: Standalone unit (model 64010), not to be confused with the Pro Convert HDMI 4K Plus Module (slot-based). Power is supplied either via PoE (IEEE 802.3af) on the RJ45 port or via 5V/2.1A through the USB-B port using the included adapter — there is no separate DC barrel or IEC power inlet. The Mini-DIN-8 control/tally port is mapped to midi-din as the closest connector id in the controlled list; the actual physical connector is an 8-pin Mini-DIN. No discrete analog audio input exists; all audio is HDMI-embedded. The forefrontimaging.com reseller listing incorrectly listed a 3.5mm audio input — not confirmed by Magewell's official spec page or any other authoritative source.

ports.name: HDMI In
ports.note: HDMI 2.0 / HDMI 1.4 / DVI-D; supports up to 4096×2160 60fps 4:4:4; carries up to 8-channel embedded audio

ports.name: HDMI Loop Through
ports.note: HDMI loop-through of the input signal; maximum 4096×2160 60fps 4:4:4

ports.name: Ethernet
ports.note: 10/100/1000 Mbps Gigabit; primary NDI output path; also powers the device via IEEE 802.3af PoE

ports.name: USB
ports.note: USB 2.0 Type B; used for device configuration, RNDIS/ECM network access, and as an alternative 5V/2.1A power input via included adapter; no separate DC barrel jack — USB-B is the only discrete power connector

ports.name: Control/Tally
ports.note: Mini-DIN-8 jack shared with tally function; supports PTZ camera control (VISCA, PELCO-P, PELCO-D) and RS-232/RS-422 via included Mini-DIN-8 to DIN-8+DB9 breakout cable. midi-din is the closest available connector id for an 8-pin Mini-DIN (the standard list has no mini-din-8 entry)
